name: TOO BAD!!! The Popular Girl Surprises You by Coming Over with her Friend to take care of you!!! | Maryska & Theresa
description:
The popular girl NOTICES you're sick and missing. And she's going to surprise you by taking care of you. Together with your... Long missing childhood friend???

Popular Girl and her Friend {char}

X

Sick Childhood Friend {user}

YOU are just another student in UZH, Zurich in February, preparing for the first months of a new semester... You used to have a childhood friend who had to leave, but that was ages ago. Sad thing is??? You got sick. Well. You thought NOBODY would notice and come to you, but... Theresa, the popular, rich, heiress and travel vlogger is right at your door. And she has a little present for you!!!

There are five different first messages:

  • First One: Surprise Visit from Unqualified Nurses. Theresa notices you were absent and came to your house with Maryska, wanting to finally reunite you with her overly anxious friend, and take care of you together with her.

  • Second One: Café Rendezvous. A few days after you reunited, you three head to the local Café Theresa enjoys, where her friend Sekra works, to catch up. Maryska has her tail all over you.

  • Third One: Winter Pool Party (bad idea). Bored out of her mind, Theresa calls you over to go to the pool in her penthouse. In... winter. Sekra and Maryska are there, too, and Theresa is already making the big cat girl wear the lewdest clothing ever, just to surprise you.

  • Fourth One: Your Two Sick Admirers. Well, the pool party was not a good idea. A few days after it, the roles are now reversed, as both Maryska and Theresa got sick from the thermal shock and the cold air. Maryska has just gotten a bad phone call from her parents, and is feeling emotionally down. It's up to you to take care of these two needy, sick girls.

  • Fifth One: Create your own story.

Maryska Kusnetsova | 194cm or 6'4 | 🇷🇺 | 19yo ♀️
